---
title: "SEEG-EEG Supplementary Figures"
output: html_document
params:
  report_root: ""
  manifest_path: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
source("_common.R")
manifest <- read_manifest(report_root = params$report_root, manifest_path = params$manifest_path)
report_root <- dirname(dirname(resolve_manifest(report_root = params$report_root, manifest_path = params$manifest_path)))
figure_dir <- ensure_output_dir(file.path(report_root, "supplementary_figures"))
```

```{r field-state-transitions}
transition_df <- read_bundle_table(manifest, "subject_field_state_transition_profiles", bundle = "supplementary")
p <- plot_state_heatmap(
  transition_df,
  x = "to_state",
  y = "from_state",
  fill = "transition_probability",
  title = "Supplementary Figure 1. Subject-level field-state transition probabilities",
  midpoint = median(transition_df$transition_probability, na.rm = TRUE)
)
save_panel(p, file.path(figure_dir, "supplementary_figure_01_field_state_transition_profiles.png"))
```

```{r field-state-subject-peaks}
peak_df <- read_bundle_table(manifest, "field_state_fine_lag_subject_peaks", bundle = "supplementary")
peak_long <- peak_df %>%
  select(patient_id, peak_lag_ms, peak_effect_mean_diff, peak_width_ms) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -patient_id, names_to = "summary_kind", values_to = "summary_value")
p <- plot_state_heatmap(
  peak_long,
  x = "summary_kind",
  y = "patient_id",
  fill = "summary_value",
  title = "Supplementary Figure 2. Field-state fine-lag subject peaks",
  midpoint = 0
)
save_panel(p, file.path(figure_dir, "supplementary_figure_02_field_state_subject_peaks.png"), width = 8, height = 6)
```

```{r archetype-support}
assignment_df <- read_bundle_table(manifest, "field_state_archetype_assignments", bundle = "supplementary")
support_df <- assignment_df %>%
  group_by(assigned_archetype) %>%
  summarise(n_subjects = n_distinct(patient_id), mean_similarity = mean(assignment_similarity, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  rename(archetype = assigned_archetype)
p <- plot_support_summary(support_df, "Supplementary Figure 3. Archetype support and assignment similarity")
save_panel(p, file.path(figure_dir, "supplementary_figure_03_archetype_support.png"))
```

```{r conditioned-eeg-maps}
map_df <- read_bundle_table(manifest, "archetype_conditioned_eeg_maps", bundle = "supplementary")
p <- plot_channel_heatmap(map_df, "Supplementary Figure 4. Archetype-conditioned EEG channel maps")
save_panel(p, file.path(figure_dir, "supplementary_figure_04_archetype_conditioned_eeg_maps.png"), width = 10, height = 5.5)
```

```{r archetype-state-preference}
preference_df <- read_bundle_table(manifest, "archetype_eeg_state_preference", bundle = "supplementary")
p <- plot_state_heatmap(
  preference_df,
  x = "microstate",
  y = "assigned_archetype",
  fill = "mean_effect",
  title = "Supplementary Figure 5. Archetype-conditioned EEG state preference",
  midpoint = 0
)
save_panel(p, file.path(figure_dir, "supplementary_figure_05_archetype_eeg_state_preference.png"))
```

```{r archetype-switching}
switch_df <- read_bundle_table(manifest, "archetype_to_eeg_switching", bundle = "supplementary")
switch_plot_df <- switch_df %>%
  filter(response_kind == "any-switch" | is.na(response_kind))
p <- plot_state_heatmap(
  switch_plot_df,
  x = "to_state",
  y = "from_state",
  fill = "mean_effect",
  title = "Supplementary Figure 6. SEEG archetype to EEG switching",
  midpoint = 0
)
save_panel(p, file.path(figure_dir, "supplementary_figure_06_archetype_to_eeg_switching.png"))
```

```{r gfp-curves}
gfp_df <- read_bundle_table(manifest, "gfp_global_coupling", bundle = "supplementary")
lagged_gfp_df <- read_bundle_table(manifest, "lagged_gfp_global_coupling", bundle = "supplementary")
peak_gfp_df <- read_bundle_table(manifest, "peak_gfp_global_coupling", bundle = "supplementary")
p1 <- plot_lag_curve(gfp_df, "Supplementary Figure 7A. GFP-global coupling")
p2 <- plot_lag_curve(lagged_gfp_df, "Supplementary Figure 7B. Lagged GFP-global coupling")
p3 <- plot_lag_curve(peak_gfp_df, "Supplementary Figure 7C. Peak-centered GFP-global coupling", x_col = "offset_ms")
combined <- (p1 / p2 / p3) + plot_layout(guides = "collect")
save_panel(combined, file.path(figure_dir, "supplementary_figure_07_gfp_global_panels.png"), width = 8, height = 12)
```

```{r gfp-controlled}
microstate_df <- read_bundle_table(manifest, "gfp_controlled_microstate", bundle = "supplementary")
transition_df <- read_bundle_table(manifest, "gfp_controlled_transition", bundle = "supplementary")
p1 <- plot_state_heatmap(
  microstate_df %>% pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("mean_state_"), names_to = "microstate", values_to = "value"),
  x = "microstate",
  y = "global_metric_label",
  fill = "value",
  title = "Supplementary Figure 8A. GFP-controlled microstate means",
  midpoint = 0
)
p2 <- plot_state_heatmap(
  transition_df,
  x = "to_state",
  y = "from_state",
  fill = "mean_effect",
  title = "Supplementary Figure 8B. GFP-controlled transition effects",
  midpoint = 0
)
save_panel(p1 + p2, file.path(figure_dir, "supplementary_figure_08_gfp_controlled_followups.png"), width = 12, height = 5.5)
```

```{r field-state-model-order}
model_subject_df <- read_bundle_table(manifest, "field_state_model_order_subject", bundle = "supplementary")
model_group_df <- read_bundle_table(manifest, "field_state_model_order_group", bundle = "supplementary")

fit_panel <- plot_model_order_curve(
  model_subject_df,
  model_group_df,
  subject_y = "mean_template_fit",
  group_y = "median_template_fit",
  title = "Supplementary Figure 9A. Field-state model-order template fit",
  y_label = "Median template fit"
)

gain_panel <- plot_model_order_curve(
  model_subject_df %>% filter(!is.na(fit_gain_from_prev_k)),
  model_group_df %>% filter(!is.na(median_fit_gain_from_prev_k)),
  subject_y = "fit_gain_from_prev_k",
  group_y = "median_fit_gain_from_prev_k",
  title = "Supplementary Figure 9B. Incremental fit gain",
  y_label = "Median fit gain from K-1"
)

stability_panel <- plot_model_order_curve(
  model_subject_df %>% filter(!is.na(split_half_stability)),
  model_group_df %>% filter(!is.na(median_split_half_stability)),
  subject_y = "split_half_stability",
  group_y = "median_split_half_stability",
  title = "Supplementary Figure 9C. Split-half template stability",
  y_label = "Median split-half stability"
)

combined <- (fit_panel / gain_panel / stability_panel) + plot_layout(guides = "collect")
save_panel(combined, file.path(figure_dir, "supplementary_figure_09_field_state_model_order.png"), width = 8, height = 12)
```
